channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - github
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 9f57b7e fix: result collector filename collision with Nextflow input staging
  • f1cc0b8 feat: implement result collector script for generating human-readable parquet fi
  • d6b6b5a fix: concatenator produces flat bar charts, normalize CIs, raise IBI CV to 0.7
  • 2b223b5 fix: relative URL paths for GitHub Pages viewer, snappy compression, sentinel wi
  • a774319 feat: add zscore criterion for sample rejection; update parquet compression to g

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →
